---
name: Improvement Request
about: Suggest an enhancement to an existing feature in Edito
title: "[IMPROVE] - "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Which existing feature needs improvement?
<!-- Example: The spellchecker, the PDF export, the dark mode toggle, etc. -->

### What is the current pain point or limitation?
<!-- Describe exactly what is frustrating or slow right now. Be specific. -->
**Current behavior:**
<!-- e.g., The spellchecker takes 5 seconds to highlight errors on large documents. -->

### What is your proposed solution or direction?
<!-- How should it behave instead? (No technical code required, just the user experience). -->
**Desired behavior:**
<!-- e.g., Spellchecker should highlight errors instantly as the user types, like Google Docs. -->

### Why is this improvement valuable?
<!-- Who benefits and why? (e.g., Saves time, reduces clicks, improves accessibility). -->

### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- List the conditions that must be met for this issue to be considered "done". -->
- [ ] Condition 1
- [ ] Condition 2
- [ ] Condition 3

### Additional Context
<!-- Add any screenshots, mockups, or links to relevant discussions here. -->
